2606.07117.title: Native3D: End-to-End 3D Scene Generation via Unified Mesh-Texture Modeling and Semantic Alignment
2606.07117.paper_summary: This paper presents Native3D, the first end-to-end 3D scene generation framework that completely bypasses 2D intermediate representations. Traditional approaches typically require adapting 3D representations to the 2D domain to leverage pre-trained diffusion models, which inevitably introduces domain adaptation issues including geometric structural distortion and texture detail degradation. To address these limitations, we design a unified mesh-texture joint representation that simultaneously models both geometric structures and texture features through a Transformer-based scene encoder, effectively maintaining spatial relationships and visual consistency among objects within scenes. We further propose the 3D Representation Alignment Loss (3D REPA Loss), which employs an improved contrastive learning mechanism to align multi-level semantic representations in the latent space, significantly enhancing geometric and textural fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that Native3D outperforms existing methods in both generation quality and editing flexibility, providing a novel solution for 3D scene editing.
2606.07117.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了Native3D，這是第一個端到端的3D場景生成框架，完全繞過了2D中介表示。傳統方法通常需要將3D表示適應於2D領域，以利用預訓練的擴散模型，這不可避免地引入了領域適應問題，包括幾何結構失真和紋理細節退化。為了解決這些限制，我們設計了一種統一的網格-紋理聯合表示，通過基於Transformer的場景編碼器同時建模幾何結構和紋理特徵，有效地維持場景中物體之間的空間關係和視覺一致性。我們進一步提出了3D表示對齊損失（3D REPA Loss），它採用了改進的對比學習機制來對齊潛在空間中的多層次語義表示，顯著提高了幾何和紋理的真實性。實驗結果表明，Native3D在生成質量和編輯靈活性方面超越了現有方法，為3D場景編輯提供了一種新穎的解決方案。
2606.07117.author: Yibo Liu et.al.
2606.07117.authors: Yibo Liu, Ziwei Zhang, Haozhou Pang, Menghao Li, Lanshan He, Gan Qi
